evidence_packets.safe_summary: Coding agents need confidence-aware repo maps where AST/parser-derived edges are distinguished from inferred regex/name-match edges, especially for blast-radius analysis. Hermione can use repo maps and static-analysis context, but must know provenance/freshness/confidence before relying on them for edits or architecture reasoning. Job-application automation raises fairness, spam, hallucination, and regulatory caveats
evidence_packets.safe_summary: A Claude Code workflow can transform job search into an agentic pipeline: scrape/evaluate postings, tailor CV/cover letters, critique drafts, and compile PDFs. Useful pattern for Hermione workflows: structured profile data, fit scoring, draft generation, reviewer-agent critique, and final artifact compilation; also a cautionary case for hallucination, bias, and over-automation. evidence_packets.safe_summary: Prompt-cache hit rate, tokens, latency, tool calls, and model/surface mix are useful operational metrics for tuning GitHub Copilot-like coding assistants. Hermione/Hermes needs similar observability for model/tool latency, retries, token/cache behavior, provider/model mix, and privacy-controlled traces to improve reliability and cost. This packet comes from the LinkedIn Telegram intake catalogue and remains social/discovery-only. It is routed only to defer/research-gap events until public corroboration exists.
